title: Germany XI vs Curacao - Predicted lineup & team news for FIFA World Cup 2026 clash
original_text: Die Mannschaft have endured group stage exits in the last two World Cups. Germany’s 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign begins this weekend against tournament debutants Curacao. Since becoming world champions for the fourth time in 2014, Germany’s performances on football’s greatest stage have been incredibly disappointing for a country of their stature. Since standing tall in Brazil, they have failed to go past the group stage twice. They are anticipated to fare considerably better in North America after being drawn into an advantageous group. With the Ivory Coast facing Ecuador in the other Group E match, Julian Nagelsmann’s side must get off to a strong start or risk another early elimination. Also read: Top four nations with most head coaches heading to FIFA World Cup 2026 Germany team news vs Curacao Joshua Kimmich of FC Bayern München will wear the captain’s armband for his nation. (Courtesy: DFL/Bundesliga) Germany suffered a serious injury blow weeks before the tournament began. Bayern Munich teenager Lennart Karl was forced to withdraw from the squad. He has subsequently been replaced by Assan Ouedraogo, who is not anticipated to start the first game. Joshua Kimmich will captain the team, with Arsenal attacker Kai Havertz and Liverpool midfielder Florian Wirtz expected to play. Jamal Musiala and Wirtz’s creative axis is fit and available, with Kai Havertz providing a physical presence as a striker. Jonathan Tah has emerged as a vital role in Bayern Munich’s central defence. He will join Antonio Rüdiger, who provides leadership and duelling ability from his stint at Real Madrid. There are no known suspensions in the Germany camp ahead of the tournament opener. The squad depth is significant, with Leon Goretzka, Leroy Sané, and Pascal Groß all available to provide alternatives off the bench. Nagelsmann’s flexible style allows him to adjust mid-game without compromising shape or quality. Die Mannschaft are essentially at full strength. Also read: Germany’s Full FIFA World Cup 2026 Schedule – Dates, kick-off times & venues Germany’s predicted lineup vs Curacao Germany (4-2-3-1): Neuer; Kimmich (c), Tah, Rüdiger, Raum; Groß, Pavlović; Wirtz, Musiala, Sané; Havertz When is Germany’s game against Curacao? 14th June, 10:30 pm IST. Which group are they in? Group E. Who else is in their group? Curacao, the Ivory Coast and Ecuador.
